mapper.select: select jobid, version, jobname, system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, cronval, confirmflag, status, phase, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, to_char(enddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as enddate, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piijob a where 1=1 and phase= 'CHECKIN' and status= 'ACTIVE' and runtype in( 'REGULAR', 'DLM_BATCH') and version in (select max(to_number(version)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid = a.jobid and phase= 'CHECKIN' and status= 'ACTIVE') and not exists(select 1 from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where jobid = a.jobid and status != 'Recovered' and trunc(basedate) = trunc(to_date(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd')) ) order by jobid

select jobid, version, jobname, system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, cronval, confirmflag, status, phase, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, to_char(enddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as enddate, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piijob a where 1=1 and version in (select max(to_number(version)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid = a.jobid) order by jobid desc

select jobid, version, jobname, system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, cronval, confirmflag, status, phase, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, to_char(enddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as enddate, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piijob a where 1=1 and jobid= #{jobid} order by to_number(version) desc
select max(to_number(version)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob a where jobid= #{jobid}
select distinct keymap_id from cotdl.tbl_piijob a where 1=1 and version in (select max(to_number(version)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid = a.jobid) order by keymap_id

select jobid, version, jobname, system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, cronval, confirmflag, status, phase, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, to_char(enddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as enddate, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piijob a where 1=1 and status in ( 'ACTIVE', 'NEW') and version = (select max(to_number(version)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid = a.jobid)
order by jobid desc
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piijob (jobid, version, jobname, system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, cronval, confirmflag, status, phase, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, enddate, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{system, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{runtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{calendar, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{time, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cronval, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{confirmflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'ACTIVE', #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_id1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_id2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_id3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, null, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into cotdl.tbl_piijob (jobid, version, jobname, system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, cronval, confirmflag, status, phase, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, enddate, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{system, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{runtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{calendar, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{time, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cronval, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{confirmflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'ACTIVE', #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_id1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_id2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_id3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, null, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piijob set phase= 'APPROVING', upddate= SYSDATE where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update cotdl.tbl_piijob set phase= 'CHECKOUT', upddate= SYSDATE where jobid= #{id} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update cotdl.tbl_piijob set phase= 'CHECKIN', upddate= SYSDATE where jobid= #{id} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update cotdl.tbl_piijob set status= 'OLD', phase= 'CHECKIN', upddate= SYSDATE where jobid= #{id} and version != #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select jobid, version, jobname, system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, cronval, confirmflag, status, phase, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, to_char(enddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as enddate, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piijob set jobname= #{jobname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, system= #{system, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, policy_id= #{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, keymap_id= #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jobtype= #{jobtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, runtype= #{runtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, calendar= #{calendar, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, time= #{time, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cronval= #{cronval, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, confirmflag= #{confirmflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phase= #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_owner_id1= #{job_owner_id1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_owner_name1= #{job_owner_name1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_owner_id2= #{job_owner_id2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_owner_name2= #{job_owner_name2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_owner_id3= #{job_owner_id3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_owner_name3= #{job_owner_name3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upddate= SYSDATE, upduserid= #{upduserid} where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piijob a where version in (select max(to_number(version)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid = a.jobid)
select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piijob a where version in (select max(to_number(version)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid = a.jobid) and a.status = 'ACTIVE' and a.jobtype = 'PII'
